nasb.text: So it was broken on that day, and thus the afflicted of the flock who were watching me realized that it was the word of the Lord.

esv.text: So it was annulled on that day, and the sheep traders, who were watching me, knew that it was the word of the Lord.

cnv.text: 那約就在當日廢除了。這樣，那些仰望我的困苦羊群，就知道這是耶和華的話。

ccb.text: 约就在当天废除了，那些注视着我的困苦羊便知道这是上帝的话。
